plugins.name: bear-helper
plugins.description: Bear's Claude Code toolkit. Sophia orchestrates a TDD harness with required Dev/Alex/Kyle trio (Janice/Mia/Raj optional), executing autonomously once the plan is approved. Key commands: /bear-helper:bootstrap (one-time setup — caveman CLAUDE.md + yolo alias), /bear-helper:ship-it (commit + Cloudflare Workers deploy + health check), and /bear-helper:lighthouse (Google PageSpeed Insights for any URL).
